author: Diego Sandoval
title: Jacob Wilson reinstated from injured list
desc: Jacob Wilson was reinstated from the injured list by the A's on Friday.
impact: Wilson has been on the injured list since May 12th after suffering a dislocated shoulder, and he has spent the last week on a rehab assignment with Triple-A Las Vegas. Through 161 at-bats at the MLB level, the shortstop is slashing .292/.311/.398 with three homers and 19 RBI.

author: Diego Sandoval
title: Brent Rooker (knee) placed on 10-day IL
desc: Brent Rooker was placed on the 10-day injured list on Friday with a bone bruise in his left knee.
impact: Rooker's IL stint is retroactive to June 9th, and an exact timetable for his return is unknown. Jacob Wilson was reinstated from the IL in a corresponding move. Rooker has slugged 10 homers, and his batting average sits at .200 through 180 at-bats this season.

author: Brenton Kemp
title: Bailey Horn (elbow) undergoes procedure
desc: Tigers left-hander Bailey Horn underwent a hydrodissection procedure on his left elbow on Wednesday to address lingering soreness.
impact: After undergoing the procedure, Horn is expected to resume playing catch next week. The southpaw's rehab hit a snag after just appearances at A-Ball. He posted a 1.59 ERA in 10 outings for the Tigers in the 2025 season.

author: Brenton Kemp
title: Brenan Hanifee optioned to Triple-A Friday
desc: The Tigers have optioned right-hander Brenan Hanifee to Triple-A Toledo.
impact: Hanifee has pitched relatively well for the Tigers this season, posting a 3.29 ERA in 14 outings. However, the Tigers added two pitchers to their active roster ahead of Friday's game against the Guardians, thus Hanifee will head to Toledo for now. His 5.03 xFIP and 4.73 SIERA suggest regression was heading Hanifee's direction prior to his demotion.

author: Brenton Kemp
title: Zack Short designated for assignment
desc: The Tigers have designated infielder Zack Short for assignment.
impact: The Tigers added three players to their active roster on Friday, thus costing Short his spot on the 40-man roster. The glove-first infielder has hit .167 with two doubles across 46 trips to the plate for the Tigers this season.

author: Brenton Kemp
title: Beau Brieske optioned to Triple-A Friday
desc: The Tigers have optioned right-hander Beau Brieske to Triple-A Toledo.
impact: Brieske recently returned from the injured list and has allowed six runs through 4 1/3 innings on the season. While he threw a combined 2 2/3 scoreless innings on Wednesday and Thursday against the Twins, the Tigers have opted to promote Jacob Waguespack from Triple-A to get a fresh arm in the bullpen to begin a three-game set with the Guardians on Friday.

author: Diego Sandoval
title: Shohei Ohtani (knee) not in lineup Friday
desc: Shohei Ohtani is not in the starting lineup for Friday's series opener with the White Sox.
impact: Ohtani was lifted from Thursday's game against the Pirates early with left knee inflammation. The injury was deemed not serious, and Dodgers manager Dave Roberts went as far as to say Ohtani would likely play Friday, so his being left out of the lineup is something to monitor. He should be viewed as day-to-day for now.

author: Brenton Kemp
title: Jacob Waguespack selected from Triple-A Friday
desc: The Tigers have selected right-hander Jacob Waguespack from Triple-A Toledo.
impact: Waguespack was acquired by the Tigers via trade from the Brewers on Wednesday, and will be available for his team debut on Friday against the Guardians. The right-hander hasn't appeared in the big leagues since the 2024 season and owns a 5.11 ERA across 105 2/3 innings in the majors.

author: Brenton Kemp
title: James Outman added to Tigers' active roster Friday
desc: The Tigers have added outfielder James Outman to the active roster on Friday.
impact: The Tigers claimed outman off waivers from the division-rival Twins on Thursday, and he will be available to make his Tigers debut on Friday. The Tigers have received little defensive production from their outfield this season, especially in center field with Parker Meadows and Javier Baez sidelined with injuries. After bursting on the scene with the Dodgers in 2022 and 2023, Outman has struggled badly at the plate in the big leagues, most recently hitting .156 without a homer alongside four steals in 70 trips to the plate for the Twins this season.

author: Brenton Kemp
title: Kenley Jansen (groin) activated from injured list Friday
desc: The Tigers have activated right-hander Kenley Jansen from the 15-day IL ahead of Friday's series opener against the Guardians.
impact: Jansen hit the IL on May 28 and struggled in his rehab outing on Wednesday, allowing three runs on two hits, a walk, and a wild pitch. He has also struggled on the mound in his first year with the Tigers, posting a 4.80 ERA across 18 outings while going just 7-for-11 in save opportunities.

author: Diego Sandoval
title: Gabriel Rincones recalled from Triple-A
desc: Gabriel Rincones was recalled from Triple-A by the Philadelphia Phillies on Friday.
impact: Rincones will return to the big league club in a corresponding move to Adolis Garcia being placed on the 60-day IL. In 12 games at the Triple-A level this season, Rincones is slashing .239/.345/.283.

author: Diego Sandoval
title: Adolis Garcia (right lat tear) placed on 60-day IL
desc: Adolis Garcia was placed on the 60-day injured list on Friday with a right lat tear.
impact: Garcia left Wednesday's game against the Blue Jays, and further imaging has revealed a tear that will sideline him for an extended period. An exact timetable remains unknown. Gabriel Rincones Jr. was recalled from Triple-A in a corresponding move.

author: Diego Sandoval
title: Yariel Rodriguez clears waivers, assigned to Triple-A Buffalo
desc: Yariel Rodriguez cleared waivers on Friday and was assigned to Triple-A Buffalo.
impact: After being designated for assignment by the Blue Jays on Monday, Rodriguez will return to the organization after clearing waivers. The righthander has given up eight runs in 9 1 /3 innings at the MLB level this season.

author: Diego Sandoval
title: Tyler Heineman designated for assignment
desc: Tyler Heineman was designated for assignment by the Toronto Blue Jays on Friday.
impact: Heineman was DFA'd on Friday in a corresponding move to Alejandro Kirk returning from the 60-day IL. Heineman has put up a batting average of .154 in 78 at-bats this season.

author: Diego Sandoval
title: Davis Schneider recalled from Triple-A
desc: Davis Schneider was recalled from Triple-A by the Toronto Blue Jays on Friday.
impact: Schneider will be active for Friday's game against the Yankees, as he was called up in a corresponding move to Daulton Varsho hitting the IL. Schneider is hitting .127 in 71 at-bats at the MLB level this season.
